text.title: Error Handling in VUI Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Error Handling in VUI to a concrete case.

section.title: Multimodal music assistant

example.code:
Intents: play-music, set-timer, weather.
Misrecognition ladder: 1. 'Sorry, I didn't catch that.' 2. 'You can say things like `play jazz` or `set a 5 minute timer`. What would you like?' 3. (visual escalation) — screen shows top intents as tappable tiles.
No-input ladder: 1. 'Are you still there?' 2. 'I'm listening — say `play music` or `set a timer` when ready.' 3. 'Tap the screen if you need help, or I'll bring up the menu.'
Escalation: visual.

section.note: Two ladders, neither verbatim-repeats; rung 3 escalates to screen UI.
